title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - JK Tyre - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? JK Tyre in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JK Tyre:
JK Tyre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JK Tyre!
